name_cn:
📣📣🔥Limited Offer
New packaging, returns accepted❗❗❗
【White Star Large】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. It holds various daily essentials and features a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery, adding a stylish touch. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style: 1286
Size: 42×35×18.5cm
